hero.subtitle: Experience world-class dental care right here in Vietnam. We combine the finest global technology with absolute dedication to deliver the perfect smile for discerning clients.

technology.title: Investing in five-star technology infrastructure is our top commitment.

items.title: CT Cone Beam G7 System
items.desc: Multi-dimensional analysis of jaw structure at ultra-high resolution. This is the core foundation for building personalized treatment plans for our clients, ensuring up to 99.9% precision.
items.imageAlt: Modern CT Cone Beam X-ray machine

items.title: 3D Intraoral Scanner iTero 5D
items.desc: Contactless jaw impression technology for absolute comfort. Clients can visualize their future restoration results directly on a high-definition touchscreen.

services.title: Comprehensive oral care solutions built to U.S. medical standards.

items.title: Aesthetic Orthodontics
items.desc: Clear Invisalign technology performed by our leading team of specialists, letting you transform your smile discreetly and flawlessly.

items.title: Artistic Fillings
items.desc: Premium German Composite material combined with advanced layering technique delivers a flawlessly natural look for your teeth.

items.title: International-Standard Care
items.desc: Deep-cleaning procedure with Gentle-Clean ultrasonic technology protects gums and enamel, sustaining lasting oral health and fresh breath.

results.title: A smile transformed,
results.desc: Over the past decade, Nha Khoa Rạng Ngời has crafted thousands of perfect smiles for business leaders and celebrities. Every smile is a unique masterpiece, reflecting each client's personal presence and status.
points: Specialist team trained in the U.S. & Europe

items.name: FlashWhite Laser Whitening
items.desc: Visibly brighter in a relaxing 45-minute session

facilities.title: A Clinic System Built to Five-Star Resort Standards

testimonials.title: Journeys That Changed Lives

items.name: Ms. Minh Anh
items.quote: More than a dental clinic — this is a genuine retreat experience. The dedication of the doctors put me completely at ease.

items.name: Mr. Hoang Nam
items.quote: A professional process with results beyond expectations. The filling perfectly matches my natural tooth color.

items.name: Ms. Thu Trang
items.quote: Five-star service from check-in to after-care. The equipment is incredibly modern and spotless.

items.name: Mr. Quoc Bao
items.quote: No sensitivity at all, and the treatment was quick. Naturally white teeth give me more confidence in important meetings.

testimonials.ctaLabel: Join Our Community of 5,000 VIP Clients

footer.desc: Redefining the standard of premium dentistry in Vietnam. We are committed to absolute satisfaction through technology and empathy.
footer.address: 123 Health Blvd, Cityville, Ho Chi Minh City
